summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory classification only. The shard is not a dedupe cluster and has no shared canonical; each open PR is classified independently or as related to its own hydrated issue context. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Standalone maintainer-owned feature/docs PR with active author/review state. No duplicate/superseded evidence and no close permission outcome is safe.
